output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Get It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: Why Landlords Withhold Security Deposits (And Why Most Are Wrong)
Tenant Rights: What Your Landlord Can and Cannot Deduct
State-by-State Deadlines for Security Deposit Returns
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Works
Get Your Deposit Back in 60 Seconds With Deposits-Back.com
key_points: Normal wear and tear is not deductible from your security deposit in any U.S. state
Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14 to 30 days or provide an itemized deduction list
A formal demand letter is often enough to recover your deposit without going to small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee with no subscription or sign-up required
output.cta: Stop waiting and start demanding. Visit Deposits-Back.com now to generate your security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no sign-up, no subscription, no stress.
output.target_audience: Frustrated U.S. renters whose landlord is withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposit and who want a fast, affordable solution without hiring a lawyer

social_hooks.short_script: POV: You cleaned everything, but your landlord is withholding your security deposit for 'cleaning fees.' Newsflash: normal wear and tear is NOT deductible. Stop letting them steal your money. Send a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com. $19.99. No sign-up. Link in bio.

social_hooks.hook_text: My landlord won't give me my deposit back... so I did THIS.
social_hooks.short_script: You moved out. You left the place spotless. Now your landlord won't give you your deposit back. Before you panic, know this: most states give them 14-30 days to return it OR provide an itemized list. If they missed the deadline, they might owe you DOUBLE. Don't beg. Demand it. Deposits-Back.com. $19.99. 60 seconds. No subscription.

social_hooks.hook_text: Can your landlord keep your security deposit? The answer might shock you.
social_hooks.short_script: Can your landlord keep your security deposit for that tiny nail hole? NO. For normal wear and tear? NO. For unpaid rent or actual damage? Maybe. But if they're wrongfully keeping it, you need to fight back. Send a demand letter that makes them pay attention. Deposits-Back.com. Get your money back.

social_hooks.hook_text: It's been 30 days and your security deposit still hasn't been returned. Here's your next move.

social_hooks.short_script: Stop sending 'hey, just checking on my deposit' texts. They know. They're ignoring you because they think you won't do anything. Step 1: Send a formal demand letter. Step 2: Threaten legal action. Step 3: Get paid. We handle Step 1 in 60 seconds. Deposits-Back.com.
